keys.description: Days after which pending guardians auto-revoke if never verified by HR. When athlete_guardian_verification entitlement is off, silent-acceptance short-circuits this at 24h.
Hours after GuardianAdded that silent-acceptance kicks in (when athlete_guardian_verification entitlement is off).

Email domain allow-list for auto-household verification. When the guardian's User.email domain matches one here, auto-verify without waiting for household detection. Rare — for tenants with dedicated parent-domain email suffixes.
After N permanent-bounce events on a guardian's User email, auto-disable can_receive_communications + fire GuardianCommunicationsBounced.
Baseline. Any finding is a P1 signal.
Days after deleted_at OR revoked_at at which the row becomes eligible for hard-purge.
